title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces two new articles to `src/content/latest-articles.ts` and updates the homepage banner in `src/pages/HomePage.tsx` to advertise this new content. It also resolves merge conflicts encountered in `src/data/blog-posts.ts`, `src/content/blog-posts.ts`, and `app/layout.tsx` during the merge process. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The merge process involved resolving several conflicts in content and layout files to ensure a clean integration of the new articles and their promotion. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces new content related to "AI 2026: The Autonomous Enterprise Revolution" and "Quantum AI Breakthrough 2026: Neural Superintelligence," including two new blog posts, a detailed case study, and a service page. A new `January2026NewContentMegaShowcaseBanner` component has been created and integrated into the `App.tsx` file to prominently advertise this new content on the homepage. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [ ] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes New files created: - `blog/ai-2026-january-autonomous-enterprise-revolution-next-gen.tsx` - `blog/quantum-ai-breakthrough-2026-neural-superintelligence.tsx` - `components/January2026NewContentMegaShowcaseBanner.tsx` - `content/case-studies/fortune-100-quantum-ai-transformation-2026.md` - `content/services/quantum-ai-neural-superintelligence-2026.tsx` Modified file: - `App.tsx` (to import and render the new banner) ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces three new blog posts and prominently advertises them on the frontend. The new posts cover "Safe Agent Releases," "Cost-Aware LLM Routing v2," and "Zero-PII Experimentation v5." They are integrated into the site's content data, featured content configuration, and a new promotional banner on the homepage. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes - New blog post content added to `src/content/blog-posts.ts` and `src/data/blog-posts.ts`. - `src/content/content-config.ts` was updated to include the new posts in featured listings. - A `NewContentPromoBanner` was added to `src/pages/Home.tsx` to highlight these new articles. ---
